zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Heard於1586年出生在英國素可其斯特時，他的父親James Heard26歲，母親Sarah Hayward23歲。他於1609年5月28日與Elizabeth Cutler在英國素可其斯特其斯特 聖 潘可拉斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1620年在英國戴文哈特藍德享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Heard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herd(e), hird(e), hord(e), Older Scots herd, hird ‘herdsman’, i.e. one who looked after cattle, sheep, or goats (Old English heorde, hierde). Compare Hardman .

variants.name: Hirt
meanings: German: occupational name for a herdsman, Middle High German hirt, cognate with English Heard .

variants.name: Hardman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herdeman, herdema+n, hurdeman (Old English hierdeman, heordman) ‘herdsman, one who tends livestock’. Compare Heard .
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name Hardman (Old English Heardmann, literally ‘hard man’).
English and Irish: shortened form of   Hardeman  .

variants.name: Heird
meanings: Scottish: probably a variant of   Heard  .

variants.name: Hard
meanings: English: variant of   Heard  . Compare   Hardman  .

English, German, Dutch, and Swedish (Hård): nickname for a stern or severe man, from Middle English, Middle Low German hard, Middle Dutch hart, hert, Swedish hård ‘hard, inflexible’. The Swedish name was probably originally a soldier's name.

English: topographic name denoting a dweller on hard, firm ground, from a transferred use of the adjective in 2 above, or perhaps sometimes from a landing-place, as in the modern Hampshire use of the term hard. Compare Hardacre .

variants.name: Herd
meanings: Scottish (Fife) and English: variant of   Heard  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Heard was born in 1586, in Chichester, Sussex, England, his father, James Heard, was 26 and his mother, Sarah Hayward, was 23. He married Elizabeth Cutler on 28 May 1609, in Chichester St Pancras, Chichester, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1620, in Hartland, Devon, England, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Heard est né en 1586, à Chichester, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, James Heard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sarah Hayward, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cutler le 28 mai 1609, à Chichester St Pancras, Chichester, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1620, à Hartland, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ko.Chichester St Pancras, Chichester, Susse: 영국 수세스 치체스터 치체스터 스트 파크라스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Heard(이)가 1586년 영국 수세스 치체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Heard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Hayward(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1609년 5월 28일 영국 수세스 치체스터 치체스터 스트 파크라스에서 Elizabeth Cutler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1620년 영국 데폰 하틀랜드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Heard родился в 1586 г. в местности шичестир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени James Heard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Hayward, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cutler 28 мая 1609 г. в местности шичестир ст панкрас, шичестир, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1620 г. в местности хартланд, девон, Англия в возрасте 34 лет.
